description_long: This is an adult male figure with a neatly groomed appearance, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve shirt tucked into straight-cut trousers, secured with a visible belt at the waist. The shirt is plain and contrasts with the darker trousers, giving a semi-formal or business-casual look. His shoes are closed-toe and formal, complementing the overall attire. The figure has short, well-kept hair and a clean-shaven face, with realistic human proportions and subtle facial features. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a tidy and professional demeanor.
description: A well-groomed adult male in a long-sleeve shirt and trousers, standing upright with arms outstretched, dressed in semi-formal attire and formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, belt, and full arm span with hands open.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and trousers, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, trousers, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with visible ear and shoe outline.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve fitted shirt and straight-cut trousers with a belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
